chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.S-64 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on MA No.4314/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection “A” 3. For orders on M.A No.4315/2025 (E/A) 4. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
